breakdown: PR refactors rewards box normalization to use centralized robust numeric extraction with fallback chains for multiple key aliases. The _get_raw helper intelligently handles edge cases (empty strings, zeros, NaN/inf). Good test coverage includes both unit tests and E2E hallucination provocation. Minor deduction for opaque _DNC abbreviation and loose Any typing on the helper function.
key_changes: Add _get_raw helper with smart fallback logic for multi-key extraction
Replace coerce_int calls with _DNC.convert_value for robust numeric parsing
Simplify gold extraction by removing manual pop operations
Add next_level_xp handling with explicit None check to default to 0
Create test_rewards_box_robustness.py with unit and E2E tests
